title: Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd!
